assumptions: The developer has a supported browser, email address, and an accepted payment card for account verification.
Git and a local runtime toolchain may be installed after a language guide is selected.
No Heroku app, runtime language, or Cedar versus Fir choice exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a verified Heroku account and deploy an official getting-started sample so its herokuapp.com URL loads.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved among nine language getting-started guides that can each deploy a sample to a herokuapp.com URL.
first_success.observable_signal: A candidate signal is the official sample site loading at its herokuapp.com URL after git push, once a language route is fixed.

route_selection.surface: Heroku Dev Center Getting Started language router and Dashboard signup
route_selection.rule: Do not invent a default language among coequal Getting Started guides; Cedar Node.js is a complete candidate, not a platform-selected universal path.

candidates.name: Node.js Cedar sample deployment
candidates.reason: Complete official sample path, listed beside other language guides without a universal default.

candidates.name: Other language Getting Started guides
candidates.reason: Dev Center start page presents multiple language routes as peer entry points.

candidates.name: Heroku Fir with Node.js
candidates.reason: Fir availability depends on Private Spaces and adds an enterprise entitlement choice.

candidates.name: Deploy an existing application
candidates.reason: Adds framework-specific preparation instead of a vendor sample path.

required_fields.label: Company name
required_fields.notes: Form states that developers without a company may re-enter their email.

required_fields.label: State
required_fields.notes: Observed when Country/Region is United States; other countries may alter subdivision fields.

required_path.observable_result: Heroku accepts the registration submission and continues account provisioning.

required_path.action: Verify the account by adding an accepted credit card under Account Settings Billing.
required_path.observable_result: The account can create apps, deploy code, and use dynos.

required_path.action: Choose one Getting Started language guide and whether to use its vendor sample.
required_path.observable_result: One Heroku first-success language route is fixed.

required_path.action: If the Node.js Cedar candidate is later selected, install the Heroku CLI, log in, clone the sample, create the app, and deploy with git.

required_fields.label: heroku create stack and git remote

required_path.observable_result: The sample app is released and its herokuapp.com URL can be opened.

prerequisites.description: Git and the Heroku CLI for CLI-based getting-started guides.
Language-specific runtime and package tooling required by the selected guide.

external_gates.description: Account verification via accepted payment card before creating apps, deploying code, or using dynos.

unavoidable_waits.description: Card verification can place a temporary preauthorization that may remain visible for up to seven days.
Build and release after git push before the sample URL serves traffic on the Node.js candidate route.

platform_outcomes.description: heroku create provisions an app name, stack, public URL, and Git remote on the Node.js candidate route.
A successful deploy serves the sample at the app's herokuapp.com URL.

excluded.item: Reading Getting Started on Heroku documentation
excluded.reason: Documentation identifies peer language routes; reading is not a counted action.
Observed as optional marketing preference, not required to submit registration.
Adds entitlement constraints beyond the Cedar sample candidate.

sources.title: Getting Started on Heroku with Node.js
Account Verification
evidence_supported: Credit card verification required for apps and dynos
Billing tab Add Credit Card steps

uncertainties.question: Which language Getting Started guide is the selected Heroku shortest path?
uncertainties.impact: Runtime prerequisites, sample clone steps, and build behavior differ across language guides.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Human selection of one language sample route, then a verified walkthrough from signup through the herokuapp.com terminal.

uncertainties.question: What exact password, email-verification, or post-submit screens follow the observed signup.heroku.com form today?
uncertainties.impact: Account path after form submit may add unverified fields or waits before Billing card verification.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated screenshots of a fresh signup completion through first Dashboard access.
